title: Limitless Fabric
description: Minecraft 1.20.1 RPG and Exploration modpack with tons of home-craft mods and plenty to experience!
body:
Limitless aims to provide users with a unique take on Minecraft. Players are able to explore, adventure, and even dungeon crawl thanks to mods such as: MineCells, Terralith, Origins, and much more. Players can experience a certain level of RPG-like content thanks to the ability to create their character, collect items with various rarities, quality, and enchantments. Players who love to explore can visit the beautiful and vast biomes created by Terralith, and the amazing villages you can discover thanks to ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Villages You can see the seasons change as you survive in a gorgeous environment, boosted by Fabric Seasons and the amazing Shader packs included in Project Limitless. In Limitless, there are so many things for the player to explore and investigate, from machines and industrialization with Create, Magic and the Arcana with Ad Astra and Wizards, and Home-Crafting and decoration thanks to the various decor and farming mods such as: Farmer's Delight, Beautify, Chipped, and Macaw's mods. There are so many things to build, and mobs to fight within Project Limitless, so you are bound to have a great time.


Join our discord at discord.gg/H22gCPXGqS
Limitless has unlimited potential, and will continue to grow as minecraft and the collection of mods in the community does as well. I'll see you on the other side, Traveler.
